status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: See also registry/entity/za/org/inforegulator.json (inforegulator.org.za) for the Information Regulator that enforces POPIA.

data.official_name: Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013 (Act 4 of 2013)
data.description: South Africa's comprehensive data-protection statute, GDPR-like in scope. Signed November 19, 2013; effective July 1, 2020 (one-year compliance grace period ending mid-2021). Enforced by the Information Regulator.

Promulgated December 1, 2021. Consolidates cybercrime offenses (unlawful access, data interference, cyber-fraud/extortion/forgery), imposes reporting duties on electronic communications service providers and financial institutions.
